headings.text: Empower Your Digital Transformation with the Right Strategy, Expertise and Tools

paragraphs: Digital transformation has provided organizations with a robust architecture allowing agility and scalability at speeds never seen before. With this new approach to computing comes a new way to think about security.
We can provide you with the right strategy, expertise and toolsets to help you navigate your digital transformation program.

headings.text: We Can Help With Your Digital Transformation

paragraphs: Our digital transformation services include:

Our Cloud Security Assessments provides a scored report that evaluates the maturity level of your organizational posture for the cloud. The final report provides you with your current state and a roadmap to a strong digital transformation.

By leveraging a unique cloud security controls framework (based on CIS and our own operational experiences), which reviews over 150 risk and security controls. We help you determine the right infrastructure and services and which cloud service providers are the right fit.

Our Cloud DevOps service provides you with strategy and implementation on the right tools, process and skills to implement a full DevOps environment in the cloud. We help you understand how an ‘security first’ mindset in the cloud is so critical in your DevOps program.

headings.text: Solutions to Meet Your Cloud Environment

paragraphs: We are an Advanced AWS Consulting partner and our cloud security services are designed to help further mature your digital transformation. These services include cloud readiness, cloud maturity and a health check.
Our Microsoft-certified, cloud security experts can help your organization gain control of your Azure environment with services around compliance, identity, security operations and visibility.
From strategy and health checks to delivering infrastructure as code, our Google-certified cloud security experts can help you understand and implement a strong cloud security program.
We can help you understand how to establish and maintain a strong multi-cloud security program to ensure the resiliency and security of your multi-cloud infrastructure.

Our Cloud Security Health Check covers the people, process and technology of your organization’s instance of Oracle Cloud. Gain a comprehensive view of your current security posture as well as a security roadmap to help resolve identified issues.

We’ve developed a robust security controls framework based on tenant, vendor and cloud service providers’ shared responsibility model. These security controls are designed to help your organization establish and implement a strong SaaS security program.

headings.text: Benefit from the Cloud Without Risk
Bake Security into Your DevOps Model

paragraphs: Our Digital Transformation services help ensure that your digital transformation journey has security built in from the start.
Ensure you have the right cloud security controls in place to gain the benefits of being in the cloud, while minimizing risk.
We help you understand how an ‘security first’ mindset in the cloud will enhance your DevOps program, including efficiency with time to market.
We can help you evaluate and select the best-fit cloud security technologies to address your business and compliance needs.
